brand.title: Sencium Lab
brand.tagline: 将精读化为可用研究资产的私人文献档案。

score_dimensions.label: 道
score_dimensions.desc: 研究问题的重要程度与战略意义。

score_dimensions.label: 法
score_dimensions.desc: 识别策略或论证逻辑的严密程度。

score_dimensions.label: 势
score_dimensions.desc: 制度背景、数据条件与文献时机的质量。

score_dimensions.label: 术
score_dimensions.desc: 研究执行的严谨程度与实现质量。

score_dimensions.label: 器
score_dimensions.desc: 数据、设计与工具对他人研究的复用潜力。

score_dimensions.label: 主观
score_dimensions.desc: 与个人当前研究议题的关联程度。

papers.title: Ambulance Taxis: The Impact of Regulation and Litigation on Health-Care Fraud
papers.authors: Paul Eliason, Riley League, Jetson Leder-Luis, Ryan C. McDevitt, and James W. Roberts
papers.one_line_judgment: 事前授权胜过追缴诉讼：首篇大规模实证证明行政监管比司法执法更有效遏制 Medicare 救护车欺诈。

themes.name: 监管与诉讼的工具比较

papers.title: Better Understanding Triple Differences Estimators
papers.authors: Marcelo Ortiz-Villavicencio, Pedro H. C. Sant'Anna
papers.one_line_judgment: 将 DDD 方法论从两期无协变量的理想世界推进到协变量调整与交错采纳的现实世界，是 DDD 应用的新标准参考。

papers.title: Fear and Risk Perception: Understanding Physicians' Dynamic Responses to Malpractice Lawsuits
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, and Jia Xiang
papers.one_line_judgment: 诉讼的恐惧比经济损失更能扭曲医生行为：一篇将非理性预期确立为防御性医疗主机制的实证研究。

papers.title: Monitoring for Waste: Evidence from Medicare Audits
papers.authors: Maggie Shi
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇将威慑效应主体化、同时证明监察不伤患者的 Medicare 浪费治理基准实证研究。

papers.title: The Health Costs of Cost Sharing
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Evan Flack, Ziad Obermeyer
papers.one_line_judgment: 成本分担不是在削减浪费，而是在逼迫最需要药物的患者停药致死——这篇文章用$11,321每生命年的代价算清了这笔账。

themes.name: 药物依从性与健康结果

papers.title: Selection with Variation in Diagnostic Skill: Evidence from Radiologists
papers.authors: David C. Chan, Matthew Gentzkow, Chuan Yu
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇用放射科医生漏诊数据彻底拆解偏好与技能异质性、并对 judges design 发出方法论警告的里程碑文献。

papers.title: The Triple Difference Estimator
papers.authors: Andreas Olden, Jarle Møen
papers.one_line_judgment: 首次将三重差分估计量的识别假设形式化推导清楚，证明它只需一个差分上的平行趋势，而非两个。

papers.title: Influence and Information in Team Decisions: Evidence from Medical Residency
papers.authors: David C. Chan
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇用住院医师准随机数据打开医疗团队决策"黑箱"、揭示影响力集中背后信息聚合逻辑的重要实证研究。

papers.title: Team-Specific Human Capital and Team Performance: Evidence from Doctors
papers.authors: Yiqun Chen
papers.one_line_judgment: 用急诊准随机配对证明医生之间的合作历史是一种可以救命的团队特定人力资本。

themes.name: 团队专属人力资本积累

papers.title: Identifying Sources of Inefficiency in Healthcare
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra and Douglas O. Staiger
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇用广义 Roy 模型将医疗变异中的分配无效率与比较优势真正拆开的方法论基准文献，44%可提升空间令人警醒。

papers.title: Understanding Doctor Decision Making: The Case of Depression Treatment
papers.authors: Janet M. Currie, W. Bentley MacLeod
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇将诊断技能引入医生处方决策框架、揭示试验价值依赖技能水平的开创性文献。

papers.title: Subsidizing Health Insurance for Low-Income Adults: Evidence from Massachusetts
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Nathaniel Hendren, Mark Shepard
papers.one_line_judgment: 大额补贴换不来全覆盖，因为低收入人群对保险的支付意愿本身就系统性地低于他们自己的医疗成本——这篇文章把这一不便的真相量化得清清楚楚。

papers.title: Detecting Potential Overbilling in Medicare Reimbursement via Hours Worked
papers.authors: Hanming Fang and Qing Gong
papers.one_line_judgment: 用物理时间约束揭示可疑过度计费：一把简洁有力的 Medicare 欺诈初筛工具。

papers.title: What Does a Deductible Do? The Impact of Cost-Sharing on Health Care Prices, Quantities, and Spending Dynamics
papers.authors: Zarek C. Brot-Goldberg, Amitabh Chandra, Benjamin R. Handel, Jonathan T. Kolstad
papers.one_line_judgment: 高免赔额计划砍掉的不是"水分"而是"肉"——这篇文章用数量分解和价格信号分析彻底重新定义了我们对成本分担机制的理解。

themes.name: 非线性合同中的消费者行为

papers.title: Sources of Geographic Variation in Health Care: Evidence from Patient Migration
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Matthew Gentzkow, Heidi Williams
papers.one_line_judgment: 用患者迁移剥离需求与供给贡献，重新定标了"医疗地区差异主要由供给侧驱动"这一既有共识。

papers.title: Teamwork and Moral Hazard: Evidence from the Emergency Department
papers.authors: David C. Chan
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇用急诊室自然实验证明团队自我管理可以打败经典道德风险预言的组织经济学力作。

papers.title: Health Insurance for "Humans": Information Frictions, Plan Choice, and Consumer Welfare
papers.authors: Benjamin R. Handel and Jonathan T. Kolstad
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇把风险偏好、信息摩擦与福利分析真正拆开的健康保险选择基准文献。

themes.name: 保险选择中的信息摩擦
选择摩擦下的消费者福利

papers.title: The Response of Drug Expenditure to Nonlinear Contract Design: Evidence from Medicare Part D
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Paul Schrimpf
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇关于非线性保险合同与健康政策反事实分析的基准型论文。

papers.title: The Effect of Patient Cost Sharing on Utilization, Health, and Risk Protection
papers.authors: Hitoshi Shigeoka
papers.one_line_judgment: 日本70岁的一刀切政策断点，为健康经济学提供了迄今最干净的老年成本分担弹性估计，顺带给出了财务保护效应的可信证据。

papers.title: Information and Quality When Motivation is Intrinsic: Evidence from Surgeon Report Cards
papers.authors: Jonathan T. Kolstad
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇用宾夕法尼亚手术报告卡干净地证明内在激励是医生质量改善主要驱动力的基准文献。

papers.title: Bayesian Persuasion
papers.authors: Emir Kamenica and Matthew Gentzkow
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇长期复用价值极高的经典信息设计框架论文。

papers.title: Productivity Spillovers in Health Care: Evidence from the Treatment of Heart Attacks
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Douglas O. Staiger
papers.one_line_judgment: 用含溢出效应的 Roy 模型一举颠覆"地理变异等于浪费"叙事的健康经济学理论与实证标杆。

papers.title: The Determinants of Mortality
papers.authors: David Cutler, Angus Deaton, Adriana Lleras-Muney
papers.one_line_judgment: 一篇从历史、国际与国内三维度系统梳理死亡率决定因素的权威综述，是进入健康经济学文献的必要背景读物。

papers.title: The Human Capital Model
papers.authors: Michael Grossman
papers.one_line_judgment: 将健康需求与医疗需求从理论上彻底分离，奠定健康经济学核心理论框架的半世纪之作。

papers.title: The Use of Knowledge in Society
papers.authors: F. A. Hayek
papers.one_line_judgment: 重新定义经济问题为知识利用问题，为价格机制与去中央化提供了最深刻的理论辩护，也是理解医疗信息不对称之根源的思想底色。

themes.name: 计划与市场的协调比较
